name: journal
description: Date-routed daily journal entries under spice/journal/. Filename pattern Journal-YYYY-MM-DD per gotcha 8 platform invariant. Nav-button-driven creation via runTemplaterTemplate; manual creation under spice/journal/ auto-applies template via templater_folder_templates.

post_install.message: Journal blueprint installed at spice/journal/. REQUIRED: enable the Templater community plugin if not already enabled. Click '+ Today's Journal' in the nav-button row to create today's file at spice/journal/YYYY/MM-MMMM/Journal-YYYY-MM-DD.md. Manual file creation under spice/journal/ auto-applies the template (via Templater folder-template registration). Frontmatter cross-links to that day's daily note via [[<DayName>-YYYY-MM-DD]] when daily blueprint is installed.
